title: Economy percentages to commodity exposure
unknown_statement: How inherited economy percentages are transformed into final commodity availability at different station types.

title: Rank order versus absolute percentage
unknown_statement: Whether top-two economy rank matters more than absolute percentage for commodity appearance.
planner_implications: Avoid overfitting to displayed percentages alone.

title: Station-class post-build divergence
unknown_statement: Whether Orbis, Ocellus, Dodec, or other port classes diverge meaningfully after completion even when previews look equivalent.

title: Specialised-port exemption depth
unknown_statement: Which specialised port classes are fully exempt from local-body economy inheritance and which only partially resist it.
planner_implications: Port taxonomy should remain cautious until class-specific confirmation exists.

title: Weak-link sufficiency threshold
unknown_statement: How much weak-link support is required before a targeted commodity outcome becomes reliable.

title: Main-port routing aggregation behavior
unknown_statement: Whether visible Market Links aggregate upstream contributions through main surface and orbital ports rather than displaying direct one-to-one causality.

title: Body-modifier stacking behavior
unknown_statement: Whether rings, organics, geological activity, and similar modifiers stack with base body economies or with each other.
planner_implications: Avoid silent double-counting in economy models.

title: Terraforming modifier role
unknown_statement: Whether Terraforming acts only as a modifier-style influence or can dominate final port behavior in some contexts.
planner_implications: Terraforming assumptions should remain weak until directly evidenced.

title: Construction-point edge cases beyond current-versus-proposed interpretation
unknown_statement: Whether every planner-visible negative CP state is explained by proposal-state conflation or whether deeper edge cases exist.
planner_implications: Avoid universalizing the Raven interpretation without more examples.

title: Initial Primary Port exception scope
unknown_statement: Whether there are additional port exceptions beyond the initial Primary Port case, and whether all initial-port classes behave identically.
planner_implications: Initial-port logic should remain explicit and caveated.

title: Body-linked public evidence granularity
unknown_statement: What the best representation is when public evidence confirms facility existence but not exact orbital/body linkage.
related_live_verification: analyst workflow and future tooling design
planner_implications: Identity and body assignment may remain partly unresolved in public-only workflows.

title: Publication threshold for planner-safe knowledge
unknown_statement: What precise confidence threshold is sufficient before a mechanic is published into planner-safe knowledge.
related_live_verification: governance decision rather than live test
planner_implications: Publication policy should remain explicit and versioned.
